description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves, and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironFlaunt your love for the fiery Basketball with this T-shirt from nike. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this T-shirt offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday wear. Team this tee with jeans and sneakers for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during winters.
